title: Private Yacht Charter Hen in Puerto Banus: Costs & Tips for 2026
html:
Planning a hen party in Puerto Banus? A private yacht charter offers an unforgettable day on the Mediterranean, departing from Puerto Jose Banus with prices starting around EUR 1,200 for a half-day trip. BoatHire24 is the platform to find and book your ideal vessel, whether you want a sleek motor yacht or a spacious catamaran.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a hen in Puerto Banus?

Prices range from EUR 800 for a small motorboat to over EUR 4,000 for a crewed luxury yacht. Shared tours start at EUR 150 per person, while a private half-day on a Sunseeker or Azimut costs upwards of EUR 1,500. A full-day catamaran for up to 12 guests typically falls between EUR 2,500 and EUR 3,500. For accurate pricing on your preferred date, browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

The most common departure point is Puerto Jose Banus itself, the glamorous marina lined with designer boutiques and restaurants. Nearby, the fishing port of Puerto Deportivo de Marbella offers alternative berths. For a more relaxed start, consider launching from Cabopino Marina, east of Marbella, or from the Estepona Marina to the west. Many charters also include a stop at La Perla Island, a small artificial islet close to the coast, or a cruise past the exclusive villas at Bahia de Marbella.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht, ideal for speed and style, up to 8 guests, from EUR 1,800 half-day
  2. Catamaran, best for stable cruising and sunbathing, up to 12 guests, from EUR 2,500 full-day
  3. Day cruiser, perfect for a smaller group, up to 6 guests, from EUR 800 half-day
  4. Luxury superyacht, ultimate prestige for up to 14 guests, from EUR 6,000 full-day

For a reliable choice, consider the Princess V58, a popular model for hen parties. You can view this motor yacht on BoatHire24 for specifications and availability.

Cost breakdown for hen party boat rentals

  • Shared tour: from EUR 150 per person, includes drinks and light snacks
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): EUR 800, 1,200, no crew required
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): EUR 2,500, 3,500, crewed and includes lunch
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: EUR 4,000, 7,000, with skipper and stewardess

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

Yes, if you wish to drive the boat yourself, you need a valid boating licence recognised in Spain. Most hen parties opt for a skippered charter, which requires no licence and is safer.

Book a skipper for at least the first trip; the local winds, such as the Poniente, can pick up quickly in the afternoon, making navigation tricky.
The operator will confirm exact requirements, but non-EU licences may need an official translation or an ICC certificate. Many charters include a crew at no extra cost.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 800, 7,000 for private charter
  • Peak months: June, July, August and September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 14 guests depending on boat type
  • Currency: Euro (EUR)

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can we bring our own drinks?

Most charter companies allow you to bring your own drinks without corkage fees, especially on a private yacht.

What is the typical itinerary?

A common route cruises east along the Costa del Sol, stopping for swimming in Cabopino Bay and lunch at a beach club.

Is there a minimum age?

There is no minimum age for passengers, but some operators require guests to be over 18 for alcohol consumption.

Are catering and decorations included?

Many skippers offer optional catering packages and can arrange balloons or banners for hen themes at extra cost.

To secure the perfect vessel for your celebration, explore BoatHire24 for a wide selection of boats in Puerto Banus. If you own a boat, consider listing it on the platform to reach event organisers. browse the listings and discover your ideal hen party yacht today.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
